channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Silo v3 brings isolated lending vaults to Injective—two-asset markets, own oracles, own liquidations. CDS kicks in when liquidity dries, shielding lenders. yINJ/IN... https://Blockchain.News/news/silo-finance-launches-risk-isolated-lending-injective #DeFi #Injective #Silo

item.title: AI coding toolkit now deploys USDC apps in one go 🛠️ describe in plain English, build, and publish live with Vercel. https://Blockchain.News/news/circle-skills-vercel-integration-usdc-app-deployment #blockchain #USDC #AIdev

item.title: 🔥 Regulated vs. unregulated stablecoins no longer a gripe—it's your counterparty risk. 130B in play as GENIUS rules move forward. https://Blockchain.News/news/stablecoin-regulation-gap-widens-genius-act-advances #stablecoin #regulation #crypto
item.description: 🔥 Regulated vs. unregulated stablecoins no longer a gripe—it's your counterparty risk. 130B in play as GENIUS rules move forward. https://Blockchain.News/news/stablecoin-regulation-gap-widens-genius-act-advances #stablecoin #regulation #crypto
